description_long: This object is a classic rifle with a dark wooden stock and a long, slender metal barrel. The stock is fixed and extends smoothly into the receiver, which is compact and features a bolt handle on the right side. The barrel is round and standard in length, with a simple front sight post and a rear notch sight, both made of metal. The trigger guard and trigger are visible beneath the receiver, and there is no visible magazine protruding from the bottom, suggesting an internal magazine. The finish of the wood is matte, while the metal components have a slightly smoother, semi-gloss appearance. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible attachments or modern tactical features.
description: A classic rifle with a dark wooden fixed stock, long metal barrel, and simple iron sights. The design is traditional and utilitarian, with a matte wood finish and smooth metal parts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed wooden stock, long barrel, and both front and rear iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the round barrel end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the continuous wooden stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
